title: Legacy Audio Collection
description: Adds 10 records with songs by Kevin Macleod and TheFatRat
body:
Legacy Audio Collection adds popular songs by legendary artists, such as Kevin MacLeod and TheFatRat, as in-game music discs. These iconic tracks are integrated into the world's exploration. Music discs can only be found in Abandoned Mineshafts with a 33% chance in chests.
Exactly

Kevin MacLeod:
- Cipher
- Fluffing a Duck
- Local Forecast - Elevator
- Hidden Agenda
- Monkeys Spinning Monkeys
- Run amok
- Scheming Weasel
- Sneaky Snitch
- Spazzmatica Polka

The Fat Rat:
- Unity
